pi_items.source: Task description (line 3) and export_result.sh (line 106). Customer is synthetic/fictional - address 742 Evergreen Terrace is from The Simpsons cartoon.
Task description (line 5): 'Create a new Fiscal Position named Tax Exempt - Nonprofit'
setup_task.sh line 70 (hardcoded product name in setup script)
Task description (line 3): '10 units of Organic Compost Bin - Large' and export_result.sh line 162 verifies qty == 10
setup_task.sh line 75 (hardcoded product name in setup script)
Task description (line 3): '5 units of Solar-Powered Garden Light Set' and export_result.sh line 164 verifies qty == 5
Task description states fiscal position should map default sales tax to None (empty), resulting in $0.00 tax. export_result.sh line 142 checks amount_tax < 0.01
setup_task.sh line 106 writes setup data to this file path

privileged_info_summary: The fiscal_position_tax_exempt task is a synthetic benchmark task that tests Odoo fiscal position configuration. All customer and product data are task-created: customer 'Green Earth Foundation' (with fictional address 742 Evergreen Terrace from The Simpsons) must be created by the agent, along with fiscal position 'Tax Exempt - Nonprofit' that maps the default sales tax to None. Two products are pre-created by task setup: 'Organic Compost Bin - Large' ($89.00) and 'Solar-Powered Garden Light Set' ($145.00), each with default sales tax attached. The agent must create a sales order with 10 units of product 1 and 5 units of product 2, expecting zero tax as the fiscal position removes the tax calculation.
